mapper.insert: insert into sys_team_relation(ancestor_user_id, descendant_user_id, depth, is_direct, create_time, update_time) with relation_src as ( select u.user_id as descendant_user_id, cast(jt.ancestor as unsigned) as ancestor_user_id, row_number() over(partition by u.user_id order by jt.ord) as pos, count(1) over(partition by u.user_id) as total_cnt from sys_user u join json_table( concat('["', replace(ifnull(u.level_detail, ''), ',', '","'), '"]'), '$[*]' columns ( ord for ordinality, ancestor varchar(32) path '$' ) ) jt where u.del_flag = '0' and ifnull(u.level_detail, '') != '' and cast(jt.ancestor as unsigned) > 0 and cast(jt.ancestor as unsigned) != u.user_id ) select ancestor_user_id, descendant_user_id, total_cnt - pos + 1 as depth, case when total_cnt - pos + 1 = 1 then 1 else 0 end as is_direct, now(), now() from relation_src

insert into sys_team_stat_event( stat_date, owner_user_id, member_user_id, relation_depth, event_type, event_amount, is_valid_user, biz_key, event_time, create_time ) select #{statDate}, r.ancestor_user_id, u.user_id, r.depth, 'REGISTER', 0.00, case when ifnull(u.total_recharge_amount, 0) > 0 or ifnull(u.total_invest_amount, 0) > 0 then 1 else 0 end, concat('REG:', u.user_id), u.create_time, now() from sys_user u join sys_team_relation r on r.descendant_user_id = u.user_id where u.del_flag = '0' and r.depth between 1 and #{calcDepth} and date(u.create_time) = #{statDate}

insert into sys_team_stat_event( stat_date, owner_user_id, member_user_id, relation_depth, event_type, event_amount, is_valid_user, biz_key, event_time, create_time ) select #{statDate}, r.ancestor_user_id, rc.user_id, r.depth, 'RECHARGE', rc.amount, case when ifnull(u.total_recharge_amount, 0) > 0 or ifnull(u.total_invest_amount, 0) > 0 then 1 else 0 end, concat('RC:', rc.recharge_id), ifnull(rc.review_time, rc.submit_time), now() from sys_user_recharge rc join sys_team_relation r on r.descendant_user_id = rc.user_id join sys_user u on u.user_id = rc.user_id where rc.status = 1 and u.del_flag = '0' and r.depth between 1 and #{calcDepth} and date(ifnull(rc.review_time, rc.submit_time)) = #{statDate}

insert into sys_team_stat_event( stat_date, owner_user_id, member_user_id, relation_depth, event_type, event_amount, is_valid_user, biz_key, event_time, create_time ) select #{statDate}, r.ancestor_user_id, o.user_id, r.depth, 'INVEST', o.principal_amount, case when ifnull(u.total_recharge_amount, 0) > 0 or ifnull(u.total_invest_amount, 0) > 0 then 1 else 0 end, concat('INV:', o.order_id), o.invest_time, now() from sys_yebao_order o join sys_team_relation r on r.descendant_user_id = o.user_id join sys_user u on u.user_id = o.user_id where o.status in ('0', '1') and u.del_flag = '0' and r.depth between 1 and #{calcDepth} and date(o.invest_time) = #{statDate}

insert into sys_team_stat_daily( stat_date, user_id, team_level, calc_depth, direct_user_count, direct_valid_user_count, team_user_count, team_valid_user_count, team_total_asset, team_total_invest, create_time, update_time ) select #{statDate} as stat_date, u.user_id, ifnull(u.team_leader_level, 0) as team_level, #{calcDepth} as calc_depth, ( select count(1) from sys_team_relation r join sys_user d on d.user_id = r.descendant_user_id and d.del_flag = '0' where r.ancestor_user_id = u.user_id and r.depth = 1 and d.create_time <= #{dayEnd} ) as direct_user_count, ( select count(1) from sys_team_relation r join sys_user d on d.user_id = r.descendant_user_id and d.del_flag = '0' where r.ancestor_user_id = u.user_id and r.depth = 1 and d.create_time <= #{dayEnd} and (ifnull(d.total_recharge_amount, 0) > 0 or ifnull(d.total_invest_amount, 0) > 0) ) as direct_valid_user_count, ( select count(1) from sys_team_relation r join sys_user d on d.user_id = r.descendant_user_id and d.del_flag = '0' where r.ancestor_user_id = u.user_id and r.depth between 1 and #{calcDepth} and d.create_time <= #{dayEnd} ) as team_user_count, ( select count(1) from sys_team_relation r join sys_user d on d.user_id = r.descendant_user_id and d.del_flag = '0' where r.ancestor_user_id = u.user_id and r.depth between 1 and #{calcDepth} and d.create_time <= #{dayEnd} and (ifnull(d.total_recharge_amount, 0) > 0 or ifnull(d.total_invest_amount, 0) > 0) ) as team_valid_user_count, ( select ifnull(sum(rc.amount), 0) from sys_user_recharge rc where rc.status = 1 and ifnull(rc.review_time, rc.submit_time) <= #{dayEnd} and rc.user_id in ( select r2.descendant_user_id from sys_team_relation r2 where r2.ancestor_user_id = u.user_id and r2.depth between 1 and #{calcDepth} ) ) as team_total_asset, ( select ifnull(sum(o.principal_amount), 0) from sys_yebao_order o where o.status in ('0', '1') and o.invest_time <= #{dayEnd} and o.user_id in ( select r3.descendant_user_id from sys_team_relation r3 where r3.ancestor_user_id = u.user_id and r3.depth between 1 and #{calcDepth} ) ) as team_total_invest, now(), now() from sys_user u where u.del_flag = '0'

replace into sys_team_stat_user( user_id, team_level, calc_date, calc_depth, direct_user_count, direct_valid_user_count, team_user_count, team_valid_user_count, team_total_asset, team_total_invest, create_time, update_time ) select d.user_id, d.team_level, d.stat_date, d.calc_depth, d.direct_user_count, d.direct_valid_user_count, d.team_user_count, d.team_valid_user_count, d.team_total_asset, d.team_total_invest, now(), now() from sys_team_stat_daily d where d.stat_date = #{statDate}
